## Additional Features - **Building Collision** — A buildings index is included for all non-filtered buildings, each carrying a per-building foundation depth in in-game meters. Depths scale with building height and footprint width and are bounded to the **−10 m** to **−80 m** range: single-family homes and low-rise structures anchor at the floor, while supertall towers with deep bedrock piles (Taipei-101 class) reach the cap. Freestanding towers, masts, chimneys, and other slender non-occupiable structures are detected by shape and floored to the **−10 m** minimum. Foundation depths drive underground tunnel-clearance collision and are also emitted as a visual `foundations` pmtiles layer visible on the in-game map. Building geometry and floor counts come from the VZD INSPIRE Buildings national cache with the Overture Maps Foundation footprint side-channel as the height fallback. - **Water Depth Index** — A water depth index restricts track placement in water bodies. Coastal bundles include a real bathymetric layer derived from EMODnet Bathymetry (1/16 arc-min DTM, ~115 m resolution); inland water (rivers, lakes, canals) uses a flat **−5 m** index that prevents surface-level track placement. - **Ocean Foundations** — A depth-colored ocean floor layer is included for coastal bundles, providing a visual representation of Baltic Sea bathymetry visible on the in-game map. - **Place Name Labels** — Three layers of place name labels are embedded in the map: - _City labels_ — Latvian valstspilsētas (city-tier LGUs — Rīga, Daugavpils, Liepāja, Jelgava, Jūrmala, Rēzekne, Ventspils) at the metropolitan scale. - _Municipality labels_ — Names of all novadi and valstspilsētas within the map boundary. - _Neighborhood labels_ — Sub-municipal settlement names (pagasti for rural areas, apkaime for Rīga's official sub-city subdivision, plus per-DPA settlement anchors from _Blīvi apdzīvotās teritorijas_). ## Methodology This map is generated through a six-phase pipeline that transforms Latvian government census, building, and employment statistics into georeferenced origin/destination demand points. **Point Seeding:** Candidate points are placed within each _pagasts_ (rural sub-municipal unit) or _apkaime_ (Rīga city sub-area) using population-weighted centroids derived from a hybrid census grid — CSP's native 100 m grid across urban areas and _Blīvi apdzīvotās teritorijas_ (DPA), refined to the 1 km rural grid elsewhere, dasymetrically distributed against the VZD INSPIRE Buildings national cache filtered through the 10-code INSPIRE `CurrentUseValue` taxonomy (residential filter + address-derived apartment unit-count cascade). **Mesh Reconciliation:** Initial point populations are refined by solving a constrained convex optimization that approximates each point's mass to residential and economic mesh ideals while preserving Tautskaite 2021 (2021 Census) totals for each LGU. Sub-LGU chochos cascade through three grains — apkaime inside valstspilsētas, pagasti in rural novadi, and pure-workplace DPA anchors for the 131 documented industrial / office clusters (e.g. the Rīga International Airport employment zone). **Aggregation:** A global scaling factor reconciles the mismatch between boundary-captured employed residents (from Tautskaite 2021 and CSP NPV010) and workplace employees (from CSP NPV020). Workplace mass is anchored to NPV020 at LGU grain and further disaggregated by NACE Rev 2 economic-activity section (NPV021, 21 sections A–U excluding T). **Commute Assignment:** Commute flows are assigned via a hierarchical gravity model with distance-decay, calibrated against CSP NPV030 at three grains — NUTS-3 region × region (5×5, near-zero suppression, IPF anchor), 42 LGU × 42 LGU (moderate suppression, IPF plus gravity fill), and sub-LGU pagasti × all workplaces (gravity-only under high suppression). Symmetric cordon snapping at LGU boundaries preserves cross-bundle commute flow. **Special Demand Injection:** Non-commuter demand generators — airports, passenger ports and ferry terminals, universities and colleges, museums, libraries, cultural centres, theme parks, national parks, historic complexes, and tourism attractions — are injected as an additive layer. Airport demand from CSP TPG010m plus Rīga International operator statistics; higher-education enrollment from VIIS institutional registry combined with CSP IGP020 per-institution counts and IGA030 form-of-study haircuts; museum, library, and cultural-centre visitor counts from KISC open-data CSVs on kulturasdati.lv (accredited-museum roster, national library-statistics table with per-institution physical visitors, cultural-centre event attendance), supplemented by per-venue operator reports for the WHS-adjacent parks, national parks, fortresses, and theme parks that the KISC survey does not cover. **Layout Reconciliation:** A final spatial pass resolves point overlaps and ensures map clickability while keeping special-demand locations fixed. ## Data Sources All demand modeling is derived from freely available Latvian government statistical datasets and public geospatial resources. ### Census & Demographics - **2021 Census** (_Tautskaite 2021_ — per-LGU, per-pagasts, and per-apkaime population and employment) — [CSP / Statistics Latvia](https://stat.gov.lv/) - **Native Census Grid** (CSP _teritorijas statistikas dati_ 1 km national + 100 m urban / DPA cell polygons and per-cell population × sex × age) — [CSP](https://stat.gov.lv/) - **TED Workplace Mass** (_Teritoriālie statistikas dati_ / NPV020 — workplace-side marginal by LGU) — [CSP PxWeb](https://data.stat.gov.lv/) - **TED Workplace × NACE Rev 2** (NPV021 — workplace by 21 economic-activity sections A–U excluding T) — [CSP PxWeb](https://data.stat.gov.lv/) - **TED Residence Mass** (NPV010 — residence-side marginal by LGU) — [CSP PxWeb](https://data.stat.gov.lv/) - **Commute O/D Matrix** (NPV030 at three grains — NUTS-3 region × region, LGU × LGU, sub-LGU pagasts × all workplaces) — [CSP PxWeb](https://data.stat.gov.lv/) - **Population by Territorial Grain** (RIG010 — annual 2000–2025 population × sex × age at region, LGU, pagasts, DPA, city, town, village, apkaime) — [CSP PxWeb](https://data.stat.gov.lv/) ### Geospatial Reference - **Administrative Boundaries** (VZD post-2021 42-LGU polygons — 35 _novadi_ + 7 _valstspilsētas_) — [VZD / State Land Service](https://data.gov.lv/dati/lv/dataset/atr) - **ATVK Classifier** (_Administratīvo teritoriju un teritoriālo vienību klasifikators_ — 7-digit codes for LGUs, 512 pagasti, apkaimes, and NUTS-3 crosswalk) — [CSP ATVK](https://data.gov.lv/dati/lv/dataset/atvk) - **INSPIRE Buildings** (VZD Annex III — national building cache with 10-code `CurrentUseValue` classifications, floor counts, and footprints; the sole building source for both modeled demand and the 3D building tiles) — [VZD INSPIRE](https://data.gov.lv/dati/lv/dataset/ekas-inspire) - **INSPIRE Addresses** (VZD Annex I — authoritative address geocoding for institutional locations) — [VZD INSPIRE](https://data.gov.lv/dati/lv/dataset/adreses-inspire) - **Densely Populated Areas** (_Blīvi apdzīvotās teritorijas_ / DPA — CSP settlement-cluster polygons per EU Regulation 2017/543, including 131 pure-workplace anchor clusters) — [CSP via data.gov.lv](https://data.gov.lv/) - **Rīga Sub-City Boundaries** (_apkaime_ polygons — Rīga City's official 58 sub-city subdivisions) — [Rīgas dome / Rīga City Council open data](https://data.gov.lv/) - **Forest Register** (VMD _Meža valsts reģistra meža dati_ — per-stand forest polygons at 1:10 000-class topo scale, quarterly refresh across all 5 forestry regions) — [VMD / State Forest Service](https://data.gov.lv/dati/lv/dataset/meza-valsts-registra-meza-dati) - **Agricultural Parcels** (LAD _Lauku reģistra dati_ — LPIS field blocks and per-parcel crop declarations) — [LAD / Rural Support Service](https://www.lad.gov.lv/lv/lauku-registra-dati) - **Hydrography** (LGIA INSPIRE hydrography — inland rivers, lakes, and coastal water polygons) — [LGIA / Latvian Geospatial Information Agency](https://www.lgia.gov.lv/en/atvertie-dati) - **Bathymetry** (EMODnet Bathymetry DTM, ~115 m resolution — Baltic Sea, coastal bundles only) — [EMODnet Bathymetry Consortium](https://emodnet.ec.europa.eu/en/bathymetry) - **Overture Maps Foundation** (auxiliary building footprint side-channel for the 3D building tiles) — [Overture](https://overturemaps.org/) - **OpenStreetMap** (road network, areal roads, and residual land-cover polygons for classes not covered by VMD + LAD) — [OpenStreetMap](https://www.openstreetmap.org/) ### Special Demand Statistics - **Airport Passenger Statistics** (CSP TPG010m monthly passenger series for Rīga International + Rīga Airport operator annual reports) — [CSP TPG010m](https://stat.gov.lv/en/statistics-themes/business-sectors/passenger-traffic/tables/tpg010m-passenger-traffic-riga-airport) · [Rīga International Airport](https://www.riga-airport.com/) - **Port & Ferry Statistics** (per-terminal annual passenger throughput for the Baltic Sea passenger ports — Freeport of Rīga cruise pax, Ventspils and Liepāja Stena Line RoRo-PAX services) — [Freeport of Rīga](https://rop.lv/en/passengers) · [Liepāja SEZ](https://liepaja-sez.lv/en/ferry-traffic/) · [Stena Line](https://www.stenaline.com/) - **Higher-Education Registry** (VIIS _Valsts izglītības informācijas sistēma_ — augstskolas, koledžas, and tehnikumi with per-institution addresses via VRAA GeoServer WFS) — [VIIS via data.gov.lv](https://data.gov.lv/dati/lv/dataset/izgltbas-iestdes) - **Higher-Education Enrollment** (CSP IGP020 per-institution enrollment + IGA030 national grain × form-of-study × legal-status × ISCED level, for haircut derivation) — [CSP PxWeb IGP020](https://data.stat.gov.lv/api/v1/lv/OSP_PUB/START/IZG/IG/IGP/IGP020) - **Museums, Libraries & Cultural Centres** (KISC _Latvijas Nacionālais kultūras centrs_ open-data CSVs — accredited-museum roster with per-museum physical visitor counts scraped from kulturasdati.lv detail pages; national library statistics with per-library physical visitor counts; cultural-centre event attendance) — [kulturasdati.lv](https://opendata.kulturasdati.lv/) · [data.gov.lv Muzeji](https://data.gov.lv/dati/lv/dataset/muzeju-statistika) · [data.gov.lv Bibliotēkas](https://data.gov.lv/dati/lv/dataset/bibliotku-statistika) · [data.gov.lv Kultūras centri](https://data.gov.lv/dati/lv/dataset/kulturas-centru-statistika) - **Tourism Attractions** (per-venue operator statistics for national parks, WHS-adjacent parks, historic complexes, theme parks, and zoos — curated from official park administration reports, SIA _Reģistru pārvalde_ annual filings, and operator communications) — [Latvia Travel](https://www.latvia.travel/) ## License This map data is released under the [GNU General Public License v3.0](https://github.com/ahkimn/subwaybuilder-eu-maps/blob/main/LICENSE). ## Credits Map authored by [Yukina-](https://subwaybuildermodded.com/credits/)
